problem_text_cn: 1401 (1) 半径为$R$的透明球体，折射率为$n$，$P$为主轴上一点，位于球心左方$R/n$处。证明：从$P$点向右发出的任一条光线（不限于近轴光）经球面折射后，将聚焦于一点，并求出该点$Q$的位置，$P$、$Q$称为齐明点；(2) 齐明点概念常用于显微镜的物镜中，以增大显微镜入射光的孔径角。设某显微镜的接物镜是折射率为$n_1$、半径为$R_1$的半球，其平底面与物同浸在折射率与物镜材料相同的油中，物即位于一个齐明点上。(i) 试设计物镜组第二个透镜的两球面的半径$R_2$和$R_3$及其构形，使其物、像也是齐明点。已知该透镜材料的折射率为$n_2$，透镜前球面与第一个透镜后球面的间距为$d_1$，透镜中央厚度为$d_2$；(ii) 估算从第二个透镜出射的光的孔径角$\beta$；(iii) 求经两个透镜成像后的放大率$k$；(iv) 设$n_1 = 1.5$，$n_2 = 1.6$，$R_1 = 3\ \mathrm{mm}$，$d_1 = 2.0\ \mathrm{mm}$，$d_2 = 1.5\ \mathrm{mm}$，求$R_2$，$R_3$，$\beta$，$k$的数值。
problem_text_en: 1401 (1) A transparent sphere with radius $R$ and refractive index $n$ has a point $P$ on its principal axis, located $R/n$ to the left of the center of the sphere. Prove that any ray (not limited to paraxial rays) emitted to the right from point $P$ will converge to a single point $Q$ after refraction at the spherical surface, and find the position of $Q$. Points $P$ and $Q$ are called aplanatic points; (2) The concept of aplanatic points is often used in microscope objectives to increase the aperture angle of the incident light. Suppose a microscope objective is a hemisphere with refractive index $n_1$ and radius $R_1$. Its flat base is immersed in oil with the same refractive index as the objective material, and the object is located at an aplanatic point. (i) Design the radii $R_2$ and $R_3$ of the two spherical surfaces of the second lens in the objective assembly so that its object and image are also aplanatic points. Given that the refractive index of this lens is $n_2$, the distance between the front surface of this lens and the rear surface of the first lens is $d_1$, and the central thickness of this lens is $d_2$; (ii) Estimate the aperture angle $\beta$ of the light exiting from the second lens; (iii) Find the magnification $k$ after imaging through the two lenses; (iv) Let $n_1 = 1.5$, $n_2 = 1.6$, $R_1 = 3\ \mathrm{mm}$, $d_1 = 2.0\ \mathrm{mm}$, $d_2 = 1.5\ \mathrm{mm}$, find the numerical values of $R_2$, $R_3$, $\beta$, and $k$.

图1401_2：双透镜物镜组的齐明点构形
img_en: Fig. 1401_1: Analysis of light refraction for aplanatic points in a transparent sphere
Fig. 1401_2: Configuration of aplanatic points for a two-lens objective assembly
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】(1) 对任意光线应用折射定律和正弦定理，证明折射光线的反向延长线与主轴的交点$Q$位置与光线角度无关，即$\overline{QC}=nR$；(2) (i) 利用齐明点条件，依次确定第二个透镜前球面中心和半径$R_2$，再由物像齐明关系求解后球面半径$R_3$；(ii) 由孔径角的几何关系，结合透镜参数计算$\beta$；(iii) 放大率为两透镜放大率的乘积，即$k = n_1^2 \cdot n_2^2$；(iv) 代入数值计算各参数。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】(1) Apply the law of refraction and the law of sines to any ray, proving that the position of the intersection point $Q$ of the refracted ray's reverse extension with the principal axis is independent of the ray angle, i.e., $\overline{QC}=nR$; (2) (i) Using the aplanatic point condition, sequentially determine the center and radius $R_2$ of the front surface of the second lens, then solve for the radius $R_3$ of the rear surface from the object-image aplanatic relationship; (ii) Calculate $\beta$ from the geometric relationship of the aperture angle combined with the lens parameters; (iii) The magnification is the product of the magnifications of the two lenses, i.e., $k = n_1^2 \cdot n_2^2$; (iv) Substitute the values to calculate each parameter.
problem_answer: (1) 聚焦点$Q$位于球心右方$\boldsymbol{nR}$处；(2) (i) $\boldsymbol{R_2 = (n_1+1)R_1 + d_1}$，$\boldsymbol{R_3 = \dfrac{(n_1+1)R_1 + d_1 + d_2}{1+\dfrac{1}{n_2}}}$；(ii) $\tan\beta = \dfrac{R_2\sin\beta_1}{R_2\cos\beta_1 + \left(n_2 - \dfrac{1}{n_2}\right)R_3}$，其中$\tan\beta_1 = \dfrac{1}{n_1}$；(iii) $\boldsymbol{k = n_1^2 \cdot n_2^2}$；(iv) $\boldsymbol{R_2 = 9.5\ \mathrm{mm}}$，$\boldsymbol{R_3 = 6.77\ \mathrm{mm}}$，$\boldsymbol{\beta = 20.0^\circ}$，$\boldsymbol{k = 5.76}$
